name: ledger-gated-agent
description: A Speculos-backed Ledger DMK CLI agent where AI proposes and the hardware screen disposes.

scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node20 --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);" --outfile=dist/index.js
